text:
Created attachment 255653
port update to version 1.2.3

Attached is the patch to update port to new version 1.2.3 [I am the maintainer]

Build tested with "poudriere bulk -t" on 13.3 amd64 + PHP 8.4, portlint: "looks fine"

https://pecl.php.net/package-changelog.php?package=excimer&release=1.2.3
1.2.3 	- Fix start time stagger, broken by previous release
